title: My Secret is Silence
author: Adyashanti
description: In this beautiful collection of spiritual teachings given through poetry and short quotations culled from his journals, dharma talks and dialogues with students, Adyashanti celebrates life and invites the mystery to wake up in the heart of each reader. This is a remarkable selection of writings from a profoundly enlightened teacher in the universal mystical tradition of Rumi, Hafiz and Kabir.
